news.title:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research Co. approves Dr. Shravanti Bhowmik's resignation as VP, effective March 31, 2026.
Mr. Narendra Lakkad appointed as Head of Corporate Development and Operations, effective April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research Co. approves Dr. Shravanti Bhowmik's resignation as VP, effective March 31, 2026.
Mr. Narendra Lakkad appointed as Head of Corporate Development and Operations, effective April 1, 2026.

news.title:
Valuation report addendum issued after NSE query; DCF method not used due to unstable earnings.
Sun Pharma Advanced Research focuses on clinical research with uncertain revenues; no financial projections provided.
news.summary:
Valuation report addendum issued after NSE query; DCF method not used due to unstable earnings.
Sun Pharma Advanced Research focuses on clinical research with uncertain revenues; no financial projections provided.

news.title:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research's Q3 FY25 net sales declined 43.3% YoY to Rs 8.45 crore.
Net loss stood at Rs 80.6 crore, while shares delivered 11.7% annual returns.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research's Q3 FY25 net sales declined 43.3% YoY to Rs 8.45 crore.
Net loss stood at Rs 80.6 crore, while shares delivered 11.7% annual returns.

news.title:
SPARC posts Q3 net loss of 806M rupees vs 797M YoY.
Revenue declines to 85M rupees from 149M YoY.
news.summary:
SPARC posts Q3 net loss of 806M rupees vs 797M YoY.
Revenue declines to 85M rupees from 149M YoY.

news.title:
SPARC board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Exceptional cost of ₹1,236 lakh due to New Labour Codes was disclosed in Q3 results.
news.summary:
SPARC board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Exceptional cost of ₹1,236 lakh due to New Labour Codes was disclosed in Q3 results.

news.title:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research got USFDA's Rare Pediatric Disease Priority Review Voucher.
The voucher follows the approval of its drug Sezaby by the USFDA.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research got USFDA's Rare Pediatric Disease Priority Review Voucher.
The voucher follows the approval of its drug Sezaby by the USFDA.

news.title:
SPARC confirms compliance with SEBI disclosure regulations, addressing volume increase queries.
The company states no undisclosed information and ensures timely disclosures to stock exchanges.
news.summary:
SPARC confirms compliance with SEBI disclosure regulations, addressing volume increase queries.
The company states no undisclosed information and ensures timely disclosures to stock exchanges.

news.title:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research surged 10.8% intraday, hitting Rs 135.
It outperformed Sensex and its pharmaceutical and biotech sector peers.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research surged 10.8% intraday, hitting Rs 135.
It outperformed Sensex and its pharmaceutical and biotech sector peers.

news.title:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research issued a corrigendum for EGM notice dated Jan 14, 2026.
Clarifies share capital structure; no changes in warrant size, pricing, or structure.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research issued a corrigendum for EGM notice dated Jan 14, 2026.
Clarifies share capital structure; no changes in warrant size, pricing, or structure.

news.title:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research Company Ltd (SPARC) schedules an EGM on February 9, 2026, at 4 PM IST via video conferencing to discuss special businesses, including issuing convertible warrants.
EGM agenda includes approval of a new ESOP Scheme 2026 and granting of stock options to employees and associates. Voting will be conducted electronically from Feb 5-8, 2026.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research Company Ltd (SPARC) schedules an EGM on February 9, 2026, at 4 PM IST via video conferencing to discuss special businesses, including issuing convertible warrants.
EGM agenda includes approval of a new ESOP Scheme 2026 and granting of stock options to employees and associates. Voting will be conducted electronically from Feb 5-8, 2026.

news.title: SPARC to issue convertible warrants worth up to ₹6B at ₹155.8 each.
news.summary: SPARC to issue convertible warrants worth up to ₹6B at ₹155.8 each.

news.title:
SPARC's R&D Day highlighted oncology, immunology focus, and clinical progress.
Positive updates on rare disease voucher dispute, partnerships, and cost optimization.
news.summary:
SPARC's R&D Day highlighted oncology, immunology focus, and clinical progress.
Positive updates on rare disease voucher dispute, partnerships, and cost optimization.

news.title:
SPARC rises 2.2% to Rs 135.4 as board plans fund-raising on 14 Jan'26.
SPARC focuses on innovation in therapeutics and delivery as a clinical-stage biopharma.
news.summary:
SPARC rises 2.2% to Rs 135.4 as board plans fund-raising on 14 Jan'26.
SPARC focuses on innovation in therapeutics and delivery as a clinical-stage biopharma.

news.title:
SPARC announced an investor presentation on Jan 8, 2026, at 4:00 PM IST.
The conference call details and access link were shared for participation and Q&A.
news.summary:
SPARC announced an investor presentation on Jan 8, 2026, at 4:00 PM IST.

news.title:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research to cut workforce by 40%, US headcount down by 80+.
Company finalizing resourcing plan for FY27-FY28 with additional changes.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research to cut workforce by 40%, US headcount down by 80+.
Company finalizing resourcing plan for FY27-FY28 with additional changes.

news.title:
SPARC shares surged 20% after a favorable US court ruling on Sezaby PRV.
Sezaby, approved by USFDA for neonatal seizures, boosted SPARC's position; shares up 14.6% at ₹153.8.
news.summary:
SPARC shares surged 20% after a favorable US court ruling on Sezaby PRV.
Sezaby, approved by USFDA for neonatal seizures, boosted SPARC's position; shares up 14.6% at ₹153.8.

news.title:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research won a U.S. court ruling on Sezaby PRV.
Court deemed FDA's PRV refusal illegal; SPARC CEO welcomed the decision.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research won a U.S. court ruling on Sezaby PRV.
Court deemed FDA's PRV refusal illegal; SPARC CEO welcomed the decision.

news.title:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research resubmits CRL for PDP-716 NDA addressing FDA facility issues.
FDA raised no safety or efficacy concerns; awaiting update on resubmission acceptance.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma Advanced Research resubmits CRL for PDP-716 NDA addressing FDA facility issues.
FDA raised no safety or efficacy concerns; awaiting update on resubmission acceptance.

news.title:
SPARC resubmits Complete Response Letter for PDP-716 NDA to OcuVex.
SPARC's resubmission pertains to its New Drug Application for PDP-716.
news.summary:
SPARC resubmits Complete Response Letter for PDP-716 NDA to OcuVex.
